# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        name: External NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          echo "Hello World" > /var/www/html/index.html

- name: sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0

- name: bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.vm-instance.networkInterfaces[0].networkTier)
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.health-check.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    portName: http
    protocol: HTTP
    timeoutSec: 30

- name: health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    tcpHealthCheck:
      port: 80

- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)
    hostRules:
    - hosts:
      - "*"
      pathMatcher: allpaths
    pathMatchers:
    - name: allpaths
      defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)

- name: target-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)

- name: forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    name: http-forwarding-rule
    target: $(ref.target-http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: 80
    IPProtocol: TCP
